arts.ttl: Colchester United fan Si Collinson with his views on the U's
arts.sum: With a win at Bromley and the aforementioned Harrogate draw, playing Morecambe was going to be a easier game, at least if the table was anything to go by. On a side note from the Morecambe game, I do feel the referee got it wrong to send off their player.

Colchester's 1-0 win over Morecambe at the weekend made it three games without defeat. The U's have not conceded in their last three games. Port Vale's 1-1 draw with Chesterfield at the weekend made ...

arts.ttl: Morecambe boss Derek Adams on defeat at Colchester United
arts.sum: Mandela Egbo's second-half strike condemned Morecambe to defeat and Adams did not agree with referee Sam Purkiss's decision to show Angol the red card. “It gives them a huge advantage – last time, we went on to win the game, this time we didn’t and Colchester scored with a deflected goal and we really contained them.
